## LibraryRuntime.IIngredient.isDairy() method

Returns true if this is a dairy ingredient. When true, dairy-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isDairy(): this is IDairyIngredient;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IDairyIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.idairyingredient.md)
